heading: Omitted
label: 2782 to 2789 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections were omitted in the general amendment of part A of this subchapter by , , .Pub. L. 90–222, title I, § 10481 Stat. 691Dec. 23, 1967Section 2782, , , ; , , ; , §§ 201–203, , , 1457, defined “community action program”, authorized promulgation of additional criteria, provided for the residence of board members in geographical areas represented, neighborhood participation, and procedures for adequate representation of groups of the poor.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 20278 Stat. 516Pub. L. 89–253, § 1179 Stat. 974Pub. L. 89–794, title II80 Stat. 1456Aug. 20, 1964Oct. 9, 1965Nov. 8, 1966Section 2783, , , ; , , , covered allotment of appropriated funds to States, reservation of appropriations, limitation on allotments to Territories and possessions, manner of allotment and reallotment, and definition of “State”.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 20378 Stat. 517Pub. L. 89–794, title II, § 20480 Stat. 1458Aug. 20, 1964Nov. 8, 1966Section 2784, , , , authorized grants and contracts for development of community action programs.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 20478 Stat. 517Aug. 20, 1964Section 2785, , , ; , §§ 12, 13, , ; , §§ 205–211, , , covered making of grants or contracts for the conduct and administration of community action programs, salary limits, a prohibition on aid to elementary and secondary education in schools, assistance eligibility, chronically unemployed poor, betterment and beautification of program area, funding of independent programs, independent programs in rural and urban areas, prohibition against membership of personnel of Office of Economic Opportunity in sponsoring organizations, financial controls within sponsoring organizations, audits, accounting, and family planning services.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 20678 Stat. 518Pub. L. 89–794, title II, § 212(a)80 Stat. 1461Aug. 20, 1964Nov. 8, 1966Section 2787, , , ; , , , covered research and demonstrations pertaining to the purposes of this part, limitation on expenditures, overall plans, reports, filing, review, and recommendations.Pub. L. 88–452, title II, § 20778 Stat. 518Pub. L. 89–794, title II, § 21380 Stat. 1461Aug. 20, 1964Nov. 8, 1966Section 2788, , , ; , , ; , , , set out limitations on Federal assistance and provided for non-Federal contributions.Pub. L. 89–794, title II, § 21480 Stat. 1462Aug. 20, 1964Oct. 9, 1965Nov. 8, 1966Section 2789, , , ; , §§ 15, 16, 17, , , 976, provided for participation of State agencies, establishment of procedures in connection therewith, grant and contract authority, State approval of plans, notice to the Governor and the community action agency of application for programs, and limitations upon the participation of private institutions.Pub.
